attacking_style: Bold, long-range solo efforts in final kilometers (7km out). Willing to gamble on sustained efforts rather than short punchy accelerations, showing aggressive racing beyond experience level.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team patterns. Appears to operate with autonomy for opportunistic moves rather than protected setups.
terrain_preference: Unknown - single observation shows capability on finishing circuits allowing sustained tempo efforts, but terrain type unclear from available data.
vulnerability: Cannot sustain long solo efforts to the line - caught with 1.6km remaining after burning matches on 5+ kilometer solo breakaway. May lack top-end sprint finish after hard efforts.
key_patterns: Attacks solo at 7km to go, committing fully to long-range efforts
Gains significant time gaps quickly (45 seconds) suggesting strong initial acceleration and tempo
Fades in final 2km after extended solo efforts, caught before finish
form_trajectory: unknown: Single race observation shows promise with dangerous attacking at just 19 years old, but insufficient data to establish trajectory
